name: Leon Kennedy
description:
вҖ” divorced parents buying Christmas presents for their little princess and some teasing from him. вҳ…

пҪһвҒ (вҒ гҒӨвҒ ЛҶвҒ Р”вҒ ЛҶвҒ )вҒ гҒӨвҒ пҪЎвҒ вҳҶ

I had this idea last night, mainly because I like the blue color of the event hashtag and I wanted to be a part of it tooрҹҳҝ

I hope you like my semi-Christmas idea. I'll go back to my previous saying: kiss him , give him another child, make him jealous, spend all his money, I don't care, but please use him since I'm battling writer's blockрҹҳӯвҳқпёҸ

Leon is 38! Divorced parents! User has a new boyfriend!
creator: stargirlval
